text: Hank, heads up — Derek just pulled the session to 7am Thursday so my whole morning's gone. Demo's landing with you closer to noon, not 9. Already told Vanessa.
Noon's fine. Is it just lead vocal or the harmony stacks too?
Full stack. Derek wants everything tracked live, no patchwork. Honestly it breathes better that way.
Fair enough. Hey, is this the one Carlos brought you from San Antonio? That minor-key thing?
That's the one. Abuelita'd probably hate the bridge but she'd dance to the verse, so. 🤙
Tracked song 3 of 5 today. Vocal comp is mostly there. Pull up the harmony stack tomorrow and we close it out.
Sounds good. I'll warm up at the house first so I'm not burning takes finding the key.
Room's booked 10 to 2. After that Lisa's in for her cut so we gotta be clean by then.
Rough mix on track 2 is up. Pulled the slide guitar back a hair so the vocal sits. Tell me if it feels too dry.
Love it. Maybe a touch more reverb on the last chorus, that San Antonio cathedral feeling. Otherwise don't touch it.
Bumped the verb on the bus, not the channel, so it breathes. Bounced a new version.
Heads up, Thursday session moved to 7am. Hank's flight got pushed so we lost the afternoon.
7am it is. I'll Uber over, Keisha's got the truck that morning. I'll bring cafe de olla for the room.
Where are we on the EP budget? Felt like we crossed five grand somewhere.
About 5,200 spent of the 8K. Three tracks down, two to go. We're in good shape for the mid November master lock.
Sending you the third harmony idea for the bridge. It's a little churchy but I think it lands.
That's the one. Stack it under the lead, keep it just under the melody so it's felt not heard. Thank you Keisha.
Andrew the backing vocal you cut on my chorus is exactly it. My label rep cried, no joke.
Means a lot Hank. That song deserved it. Tell Lisa I'm ready whenever she wants to track hers.
Co-write fragment from this morning, timestamping it: 'the highway hums in a key my abuela knew by heart.' Mood folder, minor.
Oh that's a hook. Save it. We can build a verse off that Wednesday with the writer I told you about.
Throwing a Flaco style accordion line under the second verse. Freddy Fender energy without copying it.
Yes. That's the thing nobody else in town is doing. Lean into it, that's your fingerprint.
Mastered files for track 1 are in the shared drive. Stems too, labeled by date so authorship is clean.
Perfect. Keeping every timestamped version after getting burned twice. Thank you Terrell.
